name: Grand Marnier Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat into bottom and sides of 10-inch springform pan.
2 lb CREAM CHEESE, unwrapped and warmed in Microwave for 2 minutes on high
5 JUMBO EGGS, out of shell and warmed in Microwave on high for 25 seconds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix and pat the crushed OREOS with melted butter into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth, then add sugar and mix well.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in vanilla and Grand Marnier liqueur.
5. Mix in cornstarch dissolved in water until combined.
6. Fold in melted semi-sweet chocolate and sour cream.
7. Pour the mixture into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until set, rotating halfway through baking.
9. Let cool at room temperature before refrigerating.
10. Turn off heat source when finished baking.
